rulings.Case Title: FREDERICK HUTCHINS MOLL VS. JUDITH M BRASS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEFENDANT' NOTICE OF MOTION FOR NONSUIT ON PLAINTIFF'S FIRST CASE OF ACTION FOR TRESPASS TO LAND AND INJURY TO TIMBER AND SECOND CASEU OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 29, 2024 line 1. DEFENDANT' NOTICE OF MOTION FOR NONSUIT ON PLAINTIFF'S FIRST CASE OF ACTION FOR TRESPASS TO LAND AND INJURY TO TIMBER AND SECOND CASEU OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE is DENIED without prejudice to be brought upon commencement of the jury trial and/or upon presentation of Plaintiff's case-in-chief. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: MURKELLEY, LLC, VS. MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Or, In The Alternative, Monetary Sanctions Against Mission Housing Development Corporation And Its Counsel, Mercedes Gavin, In The Amount Of $17,890
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 29, 2024 line 2. PLAINTIFF MURKELLEY, LLC, MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS, OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST MISSION HOUSING DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AND ITS COUNSEL, MERCEDES GAVIN, IN THE AMOUNT OF $17,890 is GRANTED in part. Within 10 days of notice of entry of this order Defendant shall file a sworn declaration of a responsible Defendant employee setting forth in detail a description of all the steps taken by Defendant to assure the accuracy of its representation that it had produced all responsive documents, including electronic documents, called for by the Plaintiff's Request for Documents. Sanctions granted against Defendant and its counsel in the sum of $12,500.00 payable within ten (10) calendar days from the date of the Order to Plaintiff and its counsel. Motion is otherwise denied. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. ROBERT WRIGHT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 29, 2024 line 7. DEFENDANT ROBERT WRIGHT NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT is continued to July 3, 2024. No later than June 14, 2024 Plaintiff to file declarations by persons with personal knowledge regarding the contents of any oral or written references (original and amended) provided to "Tower 737."
